global.description: The ad features a modern design with overlapping shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app with confidence.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: Circular and rectangular shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape are centered, both in a lighter green shade, creating a modern design.

elements.label: Overlapping shapes
elements.description: Another circular shape overlaps with the rectangular shape, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: Three small circles
elements.description: Three small circles are arranged in a horizontal line, outlined in a darker shade, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Confidence message
elements.description: Text reading 'Save with confidence' is prominently displayed in a bold font, conveying assurance.

elements.label: Signup details
elements.description: The phrase 'Fast signup, instant card' appears below the main message, providing additional information in a smaller font.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'Swiftstack' is positioned at the top left, presented in a clear and bold font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: The text 'Save with confidence Fast signup instant card' is displayed prominently in the center, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Install now prompt
elements.description: A call-to-action button at the bottom encourages users to install the app, designed to stand out.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The brand name is at the top left, main subject shapes are centered, and CTAs are at the bottom.
